introSection: Thunder Coaster (Japanese: サンダーコースター) is a steel roller coaster previously located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan. It operated from 1979 to 26 November 2017. It remained standing but not operating from there on out, eventually being demolished in 2023.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and dark green supports.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Thunder Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)

fullText:
Thunder Coaster (Japanese: サンダーコースター) is a steel roller coaster previously located at Nasu Highland Park in Nasu, Nasu, Tochigi, Japan. It operated from 1979 to 26 November 2017. It remained standing but not operating from there on out, eventually being demolished in 2023.



Green track and dark green supports.




 * Thunder Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)
